claims.statement: exportFile calls requireAuthenticated before exporting a file.
exportFile loads a VaultFileRecord by calling vaultFileRepository.findById(fileId).orElseThrow(...).
claims.source_quote:
VaultFileRecord record = vaultFileRepository.findById(fileId)
                .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException("The selected vault file no longer exists."));

claims.statement: exportFile constructs an EncryptedPayload from Base64-decoded record.ivBase64() and ciphertext.
exportFile decrypts payload with sessionKey and associated data by calling cryptoService.decrypt.
exportFile gets the destination parent path by calling destination.getParent().
exportFile creates parent directories when parent is not null.
exportFile writes plaintext to destination using CREATE, TRUNCATE_EXISTING, and WRITE options.
exportFile logs FILE_EXPORTED with the original file name.

entities.name: exportFile
entities.description: Method that decrypts and exports a vault file.

entities.name: buildAssociatedData
entities.description: Method that builds associated data from file name and size.

entities.name: createDirectories
entities.description: Method call used to create directories.

entities.name: decode
entities.description: Method call used to decode Base64 text.

entities.name: decrypt
entities.description: Method call used to decrypt ciphertext.

entities.name: findById
entities.description: Method call used to retrieve a vault file record by id.

entities.name: getDecoder
entities.description: Method call used to obtain a Base64 decoder.

entities.name: getParent
entities.description: Method call used to get a path's parent.

entities.name: log
entities.description: Method call used to write an audit log entry.

entities.name: now
entities.description: Method call used to obtain the current instant.

entities.name: orElseThrow
entities.description: Method call used to throw when an Optional is empty.

entities.name: originalName
entities.description: Method call used to access the original file name.

entities.name: readAllBytes
entities.description: Method call used to read all bytes from a file.

entities.name: requireAuthenticated
entities.description: Method that enforces that a session key is present.

entities.name: resolve
entities.description: Method call used to resolve a child path.

entities.name: vaultDirectory
entities.description: Method call used to obtain the vault directory path.

entities.name: write
entities.description: Method call used to write bytes to a file.

relations.description: exportFile calls findById to load file metadata.
exportFile calls orElseThrow when the file record is missing.
exportFile calls readAllBytes to load ciphertext.
exportFile calls vaultDirectory to locate stored ciphertext.
exportFile calls resolve to build the ciphertext path.
exportFile calls getDecoder to obtain a Base64 decoder.
exportFile calls decode to decode the IV.
exportFile calls decrypt to recover plaintext.
exportFile calls buildAssociatedData for AEAD associated data.
exportFile calls originalName when building associated data and audit text.
exportFile calls getParent to inspect the destination directory.
exportFile calls write to output plaintext.
exportFile calls log to record the export.
exportFile calls now to timestamp the export.
